## Added
- **Lonsdaleite Spear** and **Perfect Lonsdaleite Spear** — charged thrusting reach-weapons built on Minecraft's spear mechanics (lunge, dismount, knockback). Same melee profile as the Netherite spear, but the Perfect tier hits harder on the charged thrust and has more durability and enchantability. Crafted from Lonsdaleite / Perfect Lonsdaleite gems on sticks.
- **Lonsdaleite Mace** — a Perfect-gem smash weapon forged onto a breeze rod, mirroring the vanilla mace's craft. Keeps the fall-distance smash attack, hits harder in melee than the vanilla mace (8 vs 6 base), and is far more durable (2640 vs 500). Repairs with Perfect Lonsdaleite gems.

## Fixed
- **Crafting recipes now work.** Every recipe was stored in the pre-26.1 `recipes/` data directory, which current Minecraft no longer reads, so none of them loaded and nothing in the mod could be crafted in survival. All recipes have been moved to the correct `recipe/` directory — this restores crafting for the entire mod (tools, weapons, armor, and the gem refining chain), not just the new items.
